message:
Add flywheel multi-agent swarm beads

Added beads for supporting dual-agent (cc+cod) swarm workflows:
- bd-2bqov: --multi-project flag for dual-agent swarms across repos
- bd-1h7g2: --stagger flag for delayed agent launches (MCP Agent Mail)
- bd-2lodn: --marching-orders flag for custom agent initialization
- bd-2qdhp: CRITICAL lesson - always send Enter twice after marching orders

These enable ntm to orchestrate 60+ agents across 30+ repos with proper
staggered starts (30s) to avoid overwhelming coordination infrastructure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
